name: JumpCloud Memberships With Inactive Users
description: Detects JumpCloud group memberships that still reference inactive users.
query: SELECT m.group_id, m.user_id FROM jumpcloud_group_memberships m JOIN jumpcloud_users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE NOT (COALESCE(u.activated, true) = true AND COALESCE(u.suspended, false) = false)
remediation: Remove inactive users from all groups and verify deprovisioning workflows are complete.
